ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the car brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand was founded */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo image */,
  "brand_status" TEXT /* Current status of the brand (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the model uses */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the model */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the model */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the model in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the car body type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body type */,
  "body_type_status" TEXT /* Current status of the body type (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats typically found in this body type */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the body type in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the car color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code for the color */,
  "color_status" TEXT /* Current status of the color (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "color_type" TEXT /* Type of color (e.g., metallic, solid, pearl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealership_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the dealership */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the dealership */,
  "dealership_status" TEXT /* Current status of the dealership (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealership manager */,
  "manager_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealership manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* JSON object of opening hours for different days of the week */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the dealership location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_products" (
  "car_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the car */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the car */,
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the body type of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the car was manufactured */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the car */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the car */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the car */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealership where the car is located */,
  "stock_date" TEXT /* Date the car was added to the inventory */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the car was last sold */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) for each car product */,
  "is_new" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the car is new or used */,
  "is_certified_preowned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the car is certified pre-owned */,
  "warranty_remaining" INTEGER /* Remaining warranty period in months */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* JSON array of service history records */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., in stock, sold, reserved) */,
  "interior_color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interior color of the car */,
  "interior_material" TEXT /* Material of the interior (e.g., leather, cloth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_products_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_products_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_products_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_products_body_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_type_id") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the car product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the car product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, sell) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_product_id") REFERENCES car_products ("car_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "car_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car product sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the car was sold */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who bought the car */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "is_finance" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale was financed */,
  "finance_company" TEXT /* Name of the finance company if the sale was financed */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months if the sale was financed */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment amount if the sale was financed */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount if the sale was financed */,
  "total_payment" REAL /* Total amount paid for the car */,
  "sales_tax" REAL /* Sales tax amount */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee amount */,
  "extended_warranty" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an extended warranty was purchased */,
  "extended_warranty_cost" REAL /* Cost of the extended warranty if purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_car_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_product_id") REFERENCES car_products ("car_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "car_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car product */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was set */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the car product */,
  "price_status" TEXT /* Current status of the price (e.g., active, historical) */,
  "price_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change (e.g., promotion, cost increase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_car_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_product_id") REFERENCES car_products ("car_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory transfer */,
  "car_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car product being transferred */,
  "source_dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership from which the car is being transferred */,
  "destination_dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership to which the car is being transferred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the transfer (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "transfer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transfers_destination_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transfers_car_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_product_id") REFERENCES car_products ("car_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transfers_source_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "car_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car product being promoted */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Current status of the promotion (e.g., active, upcoming, expired) */,
  "promotion_details" TEXT /* Additional details or conditions of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, rebate, free service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_car_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_product_id") REFERENCES car_products ("car_product_id")
)
